name: Clean Your Room
short_description: Clean Your Room is a first-person memory puzzle game. There are several levels (denoted as hours) that you must complete. Each hour is more difficult than the last, taxing your memory more and more. Return all items to their designated location before time runs out!
detailed_description:
Your name's William, and today's your lucky day! You get to stay in your new room for the first time! There are tons of toys and gadgets to check-out. Well, not tons, just a couple hundred. However, with this assortment of toys comes a great responsibility to keep your room clean. While you may struggle with this in the beginning, as all children do, you'll soon find yourself remembering where every little thing belongs. Oh, and on top of building your memory, you'll make some new friends! YAY!

YOUR ROOM

Upon your initial visit to The Room, you have an hour to memorize where everything goes. Use it wisely, as each following hour will test your memory with only 10 minutes on the clock to tidy up! As each hour progresses, your memory will be taxed more and more as the room becomes more and more disorganized, culminating in the ultimate puzzle. You might be thinking, "How do I keep track of the time?" Don't worry silly goose, that's what clocks are for! Your alarm will sound off at the 5-minute and 1-minute mark.

HOW TO CLEAN

Now it is possible you may have never cleaned your room before, but it's pretty simple. Using your tiny little arms and legs (mouse and keyboard), walk around and collect any misplaced items, and return them to their designated spot by rotating, setting, dropping, or tossing them into place. To make it even easier, you don't have to worry about orientation, just location, location, location. Once you set everything in place, you just plop yourself into bed and if you put everything back where they belong, you get to progress to the next hour! If you didn't place everything in the right spot, you'll have to do it over! ;o;

YOUR FRIENDS

They will make themselves known from time-to-time, and while it might not seem like it right away, they are there for you, much like you are there for them... Oh, and don't worry, they won't stop you from cleaning your room, only your feeble memory and Father Time will.

WHAT'S IN IT FOR YOU

As mentioned before, you'll get that noggin' joggin'. If you always wanted a fun, and maybe slightly "alarming" method of expanding that memory bank you got, then this is just what the doctor ordered. Speaking of doctors, it will be interesting to see what they think of your new room...and your new friends!

supported_languages:
English*, Indonesian, Japanese, Russian, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, French, German, Spanish - Spain, Korean, Polish, Portuguese - Brazil, Romanian, Spanish - Latin America, Thai, Turkish, Ukrainian, Italian
*languages with full audio support
